mapper.sql: id, description, method, type, request_ip, exception_code, exception_detail, params, create_by, create_date
mapper.insert: insert into t_sys_log (id, description, method, type, request_ip, exception_code, exception_detail, params, create_by, create_date) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{method,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exceptionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exceptionDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{params,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into t_sys_log
id,
description,
method,
type,
request_ip,
exception_code,
exception_detail,
params,
create_by,
create_date,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{method,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{exceptionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{exceptionDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{params,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update t_sys_log
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
method = #{method,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_ip = #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exception_code = #{exceptionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exception_detail = #{exceptionDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
params = #{params,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_date = #{createDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_sys_log set description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, method = #{method,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_ip = #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exception_code = #{exceptionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exception_detail = #{exceptionDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, params = #{params,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_date = #{createDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select count(*) from t_sys_log
description like CONCAT("%", #{model.description}, "%")
and create_by like CONCAT("%", #{model.createBy}, "%")
and request_ip like CONCAT("%", #{model.requestIp}, "%")
and type = #{model.type}
and ( description like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or create_by like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or request_ip like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
and ( description like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or create_by like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or request_ip like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
